title: 続きを進めて。/kernelで。 /kernel verdict を実装に落とします。まず SSOT と gate/test の現状を読み、次に「substitution 禁止・shadow continuity の み許可」を文書化し、最後に静的テストで固定します。 • Updated Plan └ Implement the /kernel-verified fallback policy: forbid baseline substitution by Copilot/Gemini, allow only shadow continuity, and lock it in with do...
summary_text: Kernel orchestration is active and the first roadmap milestone is now closed: I removed the duplicated `shadow continuity` baseline-trio logic and moved it into one shared helper at [shadow-continuity-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/lib/shadow-continuity-policy.sh). Both call sites now use that helper: [aggregate-tutti-votes.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/aggregate-tutti-votes.sh) and [run-local-orchestration.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/local/run-local-orchestration.sh). I also added a focused contract test at [test-shadow-continuity-policy.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/tests/test-shadow-continuity-policy.sh). Verification passed on the local scope that matters for this milestone: - `bash tests/test-shadow-continuity-policy.sh` - `bash tests/test-aggregate-tutti-votes.sh` - `bash tests/test-local-orchestration-gates.sh` Lane evidence from this run: - `Codex`: main orchestration + implementation + local verification - `Claude`: live `claude --print` roadmap lane returned goal/minimal-chain/gating/milestone output - `GLM`: live `delegate-glm.js` critique lane returned conditional approval and transplant risks - Additional Codex sidecars: roadmap, repair, critique, and replan lanes were active and used to choose the shared-helper extraction instead of another probe loop Next milestone is fixed now: use this shared policy as the only truth source, then land the verified transplant chain onto a clean intake branch without touching the dirty main worktree.
